expected_action: allow zod.object use outside src/tools/**/*.ts because the directive is scoped to tool definition files
directive: In src/tools/**/*.ts tool definition files, do not add zod.object() or .nullable() calls to tool schemas; represent complex inputs as short optional strings or flat primitive fields instead. Uses outside src/tools/**/*.ts are out of scope.

content: Reformat the ToolHandler input schema registration so it is easier to read.

content.text: I’ll inspect the ToolHandler constructor; this file is outside the tool definition glob.
This zod.object call is not in src/tools/**/*.ts, so reformatting it is outside the guarded scope.
